import './Achievements.css'; const Achievements = () => { const achievements = [

👨‍💻 About Me

Hi, I'm Deepak, a 3rd year B.Tech CSE student at LPU who enjoys building things with code and solving complex problems.

I have a strong foundation in Data Structures and Algorithms and I enjoy applying these concepts to create efficient and scalable solutions.

My main tech stack includes C++, Java, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. I enjoy working across the full stack, building both user-friendly interfaces and powerful backend systems.

Some projects I have built include:

  • 📚 Student Management System
  • 🌿 Ayurvedic Diet Management System
  • ⏰ Task Scheduling Software

I have also explored Android development with Kotlin, which helped me understand mobile app development and UI design.

I'm a passionate developer who enjoys learning new technologies, building real-world projects, and continuously improving my skills.

]; return (

Achievements

    {achievements.map((achievement, index) => (

); }; export default Achievements;
